message:
refactor(fcp-cbor): clippy fixes for slicing and numeric casts

Apply pedantic clippy lints to test code:

- Remove redundant &[..] slice conversions (clippy::redundant_slicing)
  ciborium::de::from_reader(&cbor_bytes[..]) → from_reader(cbor_bytes)

- Use vec![] literal instead of push() chain (clippy::vec_init_then_push)
  Replaces sequential .push() calls with inline vec![...] initialization

- Use From trait instead of 'as' casts (clippy::cast_lossless)
  u32::MAX as u64 → u64::from(u32::MAX)
  i32::MIN as i64 → i64::from(i32::MIN)

These changes improve code clarity and eliminate potential numeric
precision issues while maintaining identical runtime behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
